mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.dim_product ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, product_id, product_name, slug, brand, description, short_description, product_status, category_id, category_name, hsn_code, base_price, selling_price, country_of_origin, weight_grams, warranty_months, is_returnable, return_window_days, primary_image_url, primary_sku, featured, seller_id, seller_name, avg_rating, review_count, total_available_qty, stock_status ) SELECT p.id, p.tenant, NOW(), p.id, p.name, p.slug, p.brand, p.description, p.short_description, p.state_id, p.category_id, c.name, p.hsn_code, p.base_price, COALESCE((SELECT o.selling_price FROM hm_offer.offer o WHERE o.product_id = p.id AND o.state_id = 'LIVE' ORDER BY o.selling_price ASC LIMIT 1), p.base_price), p.country_of_origin, p.weight_grams, p.warranty_months, p.is_returnable, p.return_window_days, (SELECT ma.cdn_url FROM hm_media.media_assets ma JOIN hm_media.product_media pm ON pm.asset_id = ma.id WHERE pm.product_id = p.id AND pm.is_primary = true LIMIT 1), (SELECT pv.sku FROM hm_product.product_variants pv WHERE pv.product_id = p.id ORDER BY pv.sku LIMIT 1), COALESCE(p.featured, false), p.supplier_id, s.business_name, COALESCE((SELECT AVG(r.rating) * 100 FROM hm_review.product_reviews r WHERE r.product_id = p.id AND r.state_id = 'PUBLISHED')::INT, 0), COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_review.product_reviews r WHERE r.product_id = p.id AND r.state_id = 'PUBLISHED'), 0), COALESCE((SELECT SUM(inv.available_quantity) FROM hm_inventory.inventory_item inv WHERE inv.product_id = p.id), 0), CASE WHEN COALESCE((SELECT SUM(inv.available_quantity) FROM hm_inventory.inventory_item inv WHERE inv.product_id = p.id), 0) = 0 THEN 'OUT_OF_STOCK' WHEN COALESCE((SELECT SUM(inv.available_quantity) FROM hm_inventory.inventory_item inv WHERE inv.product_id = p.id), 0) < COALESCE((SELECT MIN(inv.low_stock_threshold) FROM hm_inventory.inventory_item inv WHERE inv.product_id = p.id), 5) THEN 'LOW_STOCK' ELSE 'IN_STOCK' END FROM hm_product.products p LEFT JOIN hm_product.categories c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN hm_supplier.supplier s ON p.supplier_id = s.id

INSERT INTO hm_query.dim_category ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, category_id, category_name, slug, description, parent_id, level, display_order, image_url, active, featured, product_count ) SELECT c.id, c.tenant, NOW(), c.id, c.name, c.slug, c.description, c.parent_id, c.level, c.display_order, c.image_url, c.active, COALESCE(c.featured, false), COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_product.products p WHERE p.category_id = c.id AND p.state_id = 'PUBLISHED'), 0) FROM hm_product.categories c

INSERT INTO hm_query.dim_banner ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, banner_id, title, image_url, mobile_image_url, link_url, position, display_order, active, active_from, active_to ) SELECT b.id, b.tenant, NOW(), b.id, b.name, b.image_url, b.mobile_image_url, b.link_url, b.position, b.display_order, b.active, b.active_from, b.active_to FROM hm_cms.banners b

INSERT INTO hm_query.fact_inventory ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, product_id, available_qty, reserved_qty, stock_status ) SELECT inv.product_id, 'homebase', NOW(), inv.product_id, SUM(inv.available_quantity), SUM(inv.reserved_quantity), CASE WHEN SUM(inv.available_quantity) = 0 THEN 'OUT_OF_STOCK' WHEN SUM(inv.available_quantity) < COALESCE(MIN(inv.low_stock_threshold), 5) THEN 'LOW_STOCK' ELSE 'IN_STOCK' END FROM hm_inventory.inventory_item inv GROUP BY inv.product_id

INSERT INTO hm_query.cart_detail_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, cart_id, cart_status, customer_id, subtotal, currency, coupon_codes, item_id, product_id, variant_id, product_name, sku, quantity, unit_price, total_price, image_url, product_slug, brand, available_qty, created_time ) SELECT ci.id, c.tenant, NOW(), c.id, c.state_id, c.customer_id, c.subtotal, c.currency, c.coupon_codes, ci.id, ci.product_id, ci.variant_id, ci.product_name, ci.sku, ci.quantity, ci.unit_price, ci.total_price, ci.image_url, p.slug, p.brand, COALESCE(inv.available_quantity, 0), ci.created_time FROM hm_cart.cart c JOIN hm_cart.cart_item ci ON ci.cart_id = c.id LEFT JOIN hm_product.products p ON ci.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN hm_inventory.inventory_item inv ON inv.variant_id = ci.variant_id AND inv.state_id NOT IN ('DISCARDED', 'DAMAGED_SEVERE') WHERE c.state_id = 'ACTIVE'

INSERT INTO hm_query.wishlist_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, wishlist_item_id, customer_id, product_id, variant_id, added_at, price_when_added, notify_on_price_drop, product_name, brand, image_url, current_price, mrp, offer_price, in_stock, discount_percent, avg_rating, review_count ) SELECT wi.id, 'homebase', NOW(), wi.id, up.keycloak_id, wi.product_id, wi.variant_id, wi.added_at, wi.price_when_added, wi.notify_on_price_drop, p.name, p.brand, (SELECT ma.cdn_url FROM hm_media.media_assets ma JOIN hm_media.product_media pm ON pm.asset_id = ma.id WHERE pm.product_id = p.id AND pm.is_primary = true LIMIT 1), p.base_price, p.base_price, COALESCE((SELECT o.selling_price FROM hm_offer.offer o WHERE o.product_id = p.id AND o.state_id = 'LIVE' ORDER BY o.selling_price ASC LIMIT 1), p.base_price), COALESCE((SELECT SUM(inv.available_quantity) FROM hm_inventory.inventory_item inv WHERE inv.product_id = p.id), 0) > 0, CASE WHEN p.base_price > 0 THEN ((p.base_price - COALESCE((SELECT o.selling_price FROM hm_offer.offer o WHERE o.product_id = p.id AND o.state_id = 'LIVE' ORDER BY o.selling_price ASC LIMIT 1), p.base_price)) * 100 / p.base_price)::INT ELSE 0 END, COALESCE((SELECT AVG(r.rating) * 100 FROM hm_review.product_reviews r WHERE r.product_id = p.id AND r.state_id = 'PUBLISHED')::INT, 0), COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_review.product_reviews r WHERE r.product_id = p.id AND r.state_id = 'PUBLISHED'), 0) FROM hm_wishlist.wishlist_items wi JOIN hm_user.user_profiles up ON up.id = wi.user_id LEFT JOIN hm_product.products p ON wi.product_id = p.id

INSERT INTO hm_query.review_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, review_id, product_id, customer_id, reviewer_name, rating, title, comment, is_verified_purchase, helpful_count, review_status, created_time ) SELECT r.id, r.tenant, NOW(), r.id, r.product_id, r.customer_id, COALESCE(u.first_name, 'Anonymous'), r.rating, r.title, r.comment, r.is_verified_purchase, r.helpful_count, r.state_id, r.created_time FROM hm_review.product_reviews r LEFT JOIN hm_user.user_profiles u ON r.customer_id = u.id

INSERT INTO hm_query.notification_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, notification_id, customer_id, type, title, message, is_read, reference_id, reference_type, created_time ) SELECT cn.id, cn.tenant, NOW(), cn.id, cn.customer_id, cn.type, cn.title, cn.message, cn.is_read, cn.reference_id, cn.reference_type, cn.created_time FROM hm_notification.customer_notifications cn

INSERT INTO hm_query.address_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, address_id, customer_id, address_line1, address_line2, city, state, postal_code, country, phone, label, is_default ) SELECT ua.id, 'homebase', NOW(), ua.id, ua.user_id, ua.address_line1, ua.address_line2, ua.city, ua.state, ua.postal_code, ua.country, ua.phone, ua.label, ua.is_default FROM hm_user.user_address ua

INSERT INTO hm_query.return_detail_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, return_id, order_id, order_item_id, customer_id, reason, description, return_status, quantity, refund_amount, return_type, product_name, sku, created_time ) SELECT rr.id, rr.tenant, NOW(), rr.id, rr.order_id, rr.order_item_id, rr.created_by, rr.reason, rr.description, rr.state_id, rr.quantity, rr.refund_amount, rr.return_type, oi.product_name, oi.sku, rr.created_time FROM hm_return.returnrequest rr LEFT JOIN hm_order.order_items oi ON rr.order_item_id = oi.id

INSERT INTO hm_query.audit_log_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, entity_type, entity_id, action, old_value, new_value, changed_by, ip_address, correlation_id, is_critical, details, created_time ) SELECT al.id, al.tenant, NOW(), al.entity_type, al.entity_id, al.action, al.old_value, al.new_value, al.changed_by, al.ip_address, al.correlation_id, al.is_critical, al.details, al.created_time FROM hm_audit.audit_log al

INSERT INTO hm_query.support_ticket_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, ticket_id, ticket_status, subject, priority, category, customer_id, order_id, assigned_agent_id, created_time ) SELECT t.id, t.tenant, NOW(), t.id, t.state_id, t.subject, t.priority, t.category, t.customer_id, t.order_id, t.assigned_agent_id, t.created_time FROM hm_support.support_tickets t
